action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the real-time operational status of a specific robot, including coordinates, battery level, current load, and kinematic limits.

robot_id.description: The unique ID of the robot to query (e.g., 'SR_1').

action_set_definitions.name: inspect_inventory_bin
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the metadata of items at a specific coordinate to confirm weight, quantity, and ID.

action_set_definitions.name: check_zone_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks for physical obstructions, active safety interlocks, and the current WES mode in a target area.

action_set_definitions.name: set_warehouse_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the Warehouse Execution System (WES) mode (e.g., to prioritize high-priority retrievals).

action_set_definitions.name: clear_safety_interlocks
action_set_definitions.description: Disables specific safety software interlocks to allow robot entry into restricted zones.

action_set_definitions.name: request_zone_clearance
action_set_definitions.description: Issues a request to clear physical obstructions from a specific zone.

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_takt_feasibility
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates if a path is viable within the Takt Delta and within robot kinematic mass limits.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_robot_command
action_set_definitions.description: Commands the robot to perform a physical operation.

state_description.robots: Mapping of robot IDs to their current status (position, battery_level, status: 'idle'|'moving'|'picking'|'charging', carry_item_id).
state_description.inventory: Mapping of storage bin coordinates to item metadata (item_id, quantity, weight).
state_description.pending_orders: List of retrieval or storage tasks currently in the system queue.
state_description.warehouse_map: Grid dimensions and identification of blocked paths or charging station coordinates.
